title: Windows support for new features (browser, panel, workspace, pty)
current_task: Phase 12: Report — summarize results (E2E skipped: whisper-rs-sys build issue)

key_decisions.decision: User priority is browser working on Windows
key_decisions.rationale: User explicitly stated focus on browser

key_decisions.decision: Full scope: all 4 components (browser, panel, workspace, pty) + find_node_binary
Platform abstraction required — clean code for future macOS support
key_decisions.rationale: User directive: other platforms may be added, debuggability + abstraction
